docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, VERONICA M.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, VERONICA M. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-11-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-19-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS W/ THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 3-19-03 @ 10 AM AND THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE ACTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL 5 MONTHS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY ROMERO, MARINA R. AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, VERONICA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-19-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-20-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 NON-APPEARANCE. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE REMAINING PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 8-20-03 @ 10 AM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
